scripts.test:
python - <<'PY'
import shutil
shutil.rmtree('.tmp-dist', ignore_errors=True)
PY
tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test tests-pipeline.test.cjs tests-fullchain.test.cjs tests-openai-adapter.test.cjs tests-openai-fullchain-save.test.cjs tests-map-builder.test.cjs tests-trial-init.test.cjs tests-chat-session.test.cjs tests-web-generate.test.cjs
scripts.trial:openai:
python - <<'PY'
import shutil
shutil.rmtree('.tmp-dist', ignore_errors=True)
PY
tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node ./.tmp-dist/apps/agent-orchestrator/src/cli.js
